instruction: The server stack icon has two copies of the red X mark. Remove the duplicate.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/server-stack.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M5.25 14.25h13.5m-13.5 0a3 3 0 0 1-3-3m3 3a3 3 0 1 0 0 6h13.5a3 3 0 1 0 0-6m-16.5-3a3 3 0 0 1 3-3h13.5a3 3 0 0 1 3 3m-19.5 0a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 .9-2.7L5.737 5.1a3.375 3.375 0 0 1 2.7-1.35h7.126c1.062 0 2.062.5 2.7 1.35l2.587 3.45a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 .9 2.7m0 0a3 3 0 0 1-3 3m0 3h.008v.008h-.008v-.008Zm0-6h.008v.008h-.008v-.008Zm-3 6h.008v.008h-.008v-.008Zm0-6h.008v.008h-.008v-.008Z"/></g>
  <polyline id="x" fill="none" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="100,16 112,28 106,22 112,16 100,28" />
  <polyline id="x-dup" fill="none" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="100,4 112,16 106,10 112,4 100,16" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/server-stack.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M5.25 14.25h13.5m-13.5 0a3 3 0 0 1-3-3m3 3a3 3 0 1 0 0 6h13.5a3 3 0 1 0 0-6m-16.5-3a3 3 0 0 1 3-3h13.5a3 3 0 0 1 3 3m-19.5 0a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 .9-2.7L5.737 5.1a3.375 3.375 0 0 1 2.7-1.35h7.126c1.062 0 2.062.5 2.7 1.35l2.587 3.45a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 .9 2.7m0 0a3 3 0 0 1-3 3m0 3h.008v.008h-.008v-.008Zm0-6h.008v.008h-.008v-.008Zm-3 6h.008v.008h-.008v-.008Zm0-6h.008v.008h-.008v-.008Z"/></g>
  <polyline id="x" fill="none" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="100,16 112,28 106,22 112,16 100,28" />
</svg>
